New pull currency that reverts to pure cores at end of cycle... reworked rewards for weekly stuff... aa pushing +12 characters
releasing AA for every character, despite saying they'd drip feed them over time
Some/all have been walked back
and ofc the poor communication surrounding all of this ("oh btw here's a shitload of changes we never announced ahead of time")
makes sense, the game most def seemed dupe heavy but it usually only to E3, can’t imagine having to 12+ a unit to make them viable

extreme tl;dr

1. ethereal cores where a mechanic to replace some sources of luminous cores, basically the same thing but time limited

2. gonna shove some weeklies into modes like traphase which frankly almost no one likes

3. Axioms dropped which while some were whatever, a lot where very impactfull especially on newer units and Doresian got his biggest flaws fixes by AA

4. Light, in reponse, made a letter talking about how he was sorry and that he’ll fix these errors overtime, but considering the mood at the time it didn’t go over well


In the end, ethereals are not replacing luminous cores, weeklies won’t lock so many rewards behind stuff like traphase, weaker axioms will be buffed and Doresian base kit is buffed
I probably missed something but this is a very quick tl;dr
Ty

Should I actively avoid symptom cards? Is having more cards bad in general?
yes and yes
generally speaking u want the minimum number of cards in your deck
imagine it like this, there are good cards in your deck and there are bad cards
lets say 1 of them is really good in your 16 card deck
u are going to draw it once every 4 turns
if u remove a single card now u are guaranteed to see it in 3
if u remove 11 cards it will always be in your opening hand
And the reverse is also true, the more symptoms u take, the more turns you need to draw it
Previously I went for them because some of them have arith lol
you can take SOME symptoms
if u think the tradeoff is worth it
but generally speaking u are running a deck of cards that u want
so any symptom is going to be worse than those cards
which further your gameplan
if your deck is actually trash and u dont need command cards to win then by all means feel free to take symptoms
